query:
UPDATE island_guides SET 
  topThingsToDo = JSON_ARRAY(
    JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Hanifaru Bay Snorkeling', 'description', 'The main attraction located 10 minutes away, where large numbers of manta rays and whale sharks gather, especially between June and November. This UNESCO-protected bay offers the best manta ray encounters in the Maldives.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Scuba Diving & Training', 'description', 'Explore renowned dive sites like Dharavandhoo Thila. Local PADI centers like Liquid Salt Divers and Mantastic Divers offer trips for all skill levels, from beginners to advanced divers.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('title', 'House Reef Snorkeling', 'description', 'Access the island''s excellent house reef, which is filled with colorful coral, tropical fish, turtles, and reef sharks. Perfect for quick snorkeling sessions right from the island.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Sandbanks & Picnic Islands', 'description', 'Take a boat trip to nearby secluded sandbanks for a private picnic, sunbathing, or a romantic dinner. Experience pristine white sand and turquoise waters.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('title', 'Dolphin Sunset Cruise', 'description', 'Book a trip to see local dolphin populations while enjoying the sunset. A popular evening activity offering magical views and wildlife encounters.')
  ),
  attractions = JSON_ARRAY(
    JSON_OBJECT('name', 'Hanifaru Bay', 'description', 'UNESCO-protected marine protected area famous for manta ray and whale shark aggregations. Best visited June-November with peak months in September-October.', 'type', 'Snorkeling/Diving', 'distance', '10 minutes by boat'),
    JSON_OBJECT('name', 'Dharavandhoo Thila', 'description', 'Renowned dive site featuring coral formations, tropical fish, and occasional larger marine life. Suitable for all diving levels.', 'type', 'Diving', 'distance', 'Nearby'),
    JSON_OBJECT('name', 'House Reef', 'description', 'Excellent snorkeling spot with vibrant coral, tropical fish, sea turtles, and reef sharks. Accessible directly from the island shore.', 'type', 'Snorkeling', 'distance', 'On island'),
    JSON_OBJECT('name', 'Local Fish Market', 'description', 'Visit the harbor area and fish market in the evening where sharks and rays can often be seen. Experience authentic local island life and culture.', 'type', 'Cultural', 'distance', 'On island'),
    JSON_OBJECT('name', 'Nearby Sandbanks', 'description', 'Secluded white sand islands perfect for private picnics, sunbathing, and romantic dinners. Accessible by boat from the island.', 'type', 'Beach', 'distance', 'Boat trip away')
  ),
  beachesLocalRules = JSON_OBJECT(
    'beaches', JSON_ARRAY(
      JSON_OBJECT('name', 'Local Beach', 'description', 'The main public beach area where locals and visitors gather. Respectful dress recommended in local areas.'),
      JSON_OBJECT('name', 'Resort Beaches', 'description', 'Nearby resort beaches accessible via day passes. These offer luxury amenities and dining options.')
    ),
    'localRules', JSON_ARRAY(
      'Dress modestly when exploring the local village and harbor areas',
      'Respect prayer times - avoid loud activities during Azan (call to prayer)',
      'Drone flying is restricted on the island due to proximity to the airport',
      'Ask permission before photographing local residents',
      'Alcohol is not available on local islands - bring from Male or resort islands',
      'Friday is the holy day - some services may have limited hours'
    ),
    'culturalTips', JSON_ARRAY(
      'Learn basic Dhivehi greetings - locals appreciate the effort',
      'Visit the fish market in the evening to see sharks and rays being unloaded',
      'Try local cuisine at island restaurants for authentic Maldivian flavors',
      'Engage respectfully with local fishermen and dive operators'
    )
  ),
  faq = JSON_ARRAY(
    JSON_OBJECT('question', 'What is the best time to visit Dharavandhoo?', 'answer', 'The best time is June through November for manta rays and whale sharks, with September and October being peak months. However, the island is beautiful year-round.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('question', 'Can I see manta rays and whale sharks?', 'answer', 'Yes! Hanifaru Bay is famous for manta ray and whale shark aggregations, especially June-November. Peak season is September-October when hundreds of mantas gather.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('question', 'How do I get to Dharavandhoo?', 'answer', 'The island has its own airport (DRV) with a 25-minute flight from Malé. Alternatively, take a ferry or speedboat from Malé (45-120 minutes).'),
    JSON_OBJECT('question', 'Are there diving courses available?', 'answer', 'Yes, local PADI centers like Liquid Salt Divers and Mantastic Divers offer training courses and guided dives for all skill levels.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('question', 'Can I do water sports?', 'answer', 'Yes, activities include night fishing, fun-tube rides, dolphin watching cruises, and various water sports organized by local guest houses and operators.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('question', 'What about accommodation options?', 'answer', 'Dharavandhoo offers local guest houses and budget accommodations. You can also arrange day passes to nearby luxury resorts for dining and amenities.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('question', 'Is there a house reef?', 'answer', 'Yes, the island has an excellent house reef filled with colorful coral, tropical fish, turtles, and reef sharks. Perfect for snorkeling right from shore.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('question', 'Can I use drones?', 'answer', 'No, drone flying is restricted on the island due to proximity to the airport.')
  )
WHERE slug = 'dharavandhoo-baa';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute UPDATE island_guides SET

    JSON_OBJECT('question', 'Can I see manta rays and whale sharks?', 'answer', 'Yes! Hanifaru Bay is famous for manta ray and whale shark aggregations, especially June-November. Peak season is September-October when hundreds of mantas gather.'),

    JSON_OBJECT('question', 'Can I do water sports?', 'answer', 'Yes, activities include night fishing, fun-tube rides, dolphin watching cruises, and various water sports organized by local guest houses and operators.'),

  )
